thread_title: Who Ryker's Designer pls come talk ?

content: To me, Ryker as a supportive awakener would be much better if he could maximize his ability *on his own*, instead of co-op with other Sigil awakeners. As a supporter already, it would be confusing if he needs his own supporter in the team, it’s rare there are more seats too. Even if we use Ryker as the main attacker, he still needs other Sigil awakened to active HIS talents, and this is weird. It’s would be nice if his abilities could be activated solely by HIS OWN. His talents now only work well when there are other Sigil awakeners in the team…
thread_title: Who Ryker's Designer pls come talk ?

thread_title: ✅「已回答」症狀卡「多疑」效果疑不完全

content:
那篇描述是「抽出此卡『後』」，那麼「棄掉」也繼續計算出牌數沒有錯；但是如果我這回合抽到他之前出了三張牌，最後一張牌又導致抽牌並抽出他，那根據卡面描述他應該要認定我沒有出滿三張牌而在下回合生效給我算力

如果不給，卡面不應為「抽出此卡『後』」，而應為「『若』抽出此卡」
thread_title: ✅「已回答」症狀卡「多疑」效果疑不完全

content:
同意應該修改
但我認為原本意思應該就是抽出此卡後進行判定，不然沒有加上本回合的必要，直接抽出此卡後若出牌少於等於三次
thread_title: ✅「已回答」症狀卡「多疑」效果疑不完全

content:

thread_title: ✅「已回答」症狀卡「多疑」效果疑不完全

content: 直接刪掉就好了，從「若本回合」開始。因為你要有抽出此卡這個條件，首先你要實際抽到他，那麼卡面額外強調「抽出此卡後」，相當於強調「後」的行為，而非「本回合抽出此卡前」的行為。說抽出此卡後「開始計算」然後這個計算要回溯到抽出之前的行為（出牌數）是說不通的。
thread_title: ✅「已回答」症狀卡「多疑」效果疑不完全

content: 畢竟本來就只能在抽出此卡後開始判定，沒抽就不會判定，那麼如果卡面額外說抽出此卡後，就跟「抽出此卡了」這個現象重複了，重複強調必有其他意涵。除非又掉進了卡面描述不精確的陷阱。

content:
多疑的效果實際上為
抽到後，給予一層狀態 症狀：多疑”若本回合打出卡牌少於等於3張,下回合額外獲得2點算力。”
實際並不是卡牌計算並給予後續效果
是狀態計算並給予後續效果
而狀態本身計算的是本回合

thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pursuit does not count towards Mouchette's wheel

content: The wheel effect is on "Strike" **card play**, and Dramatic Encounter is not a card, no?
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pursuit does not count towards Mouchette's wheel

content: it doesnt mention card anywhere
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pursuit does not count towards Mouchette's wheel

content: playing any Awakener "Strike", but it doesnt hurt to see if the coding is intended or not
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Pursuit does not count towards Mouchette's wheel
✅「Answered」Pursuit does not count towards Mouchette's wheel

content:
Oh, my bad, but the term "play" would need it to be a card to activate the effect no?

The word "play" only happens whenever the player drags a card to the center of the screen and plays it. 

This can be seen with GHelot chains, Pollux sacred heart, with effects that tick up every time the card is *played*. Replaying it with the effects of Hameln or Pollux OE will not increment their counters, as these would only *trigger* the effects without having to *play* the card itself.

Since Dramatic Encounter is not a card, it can't be played, and therefore cannot trigger any "on play" effects like Mouchette's own wheel... it's only an effect with a trigger.

content:
To separate the concerns of card naming and card effects, and to better understand each unit, maybe we should have a tag system like enemies does. 

Example, in murphy: fauxborn kit, its stated that tulu, goliath, faros and miryam are all lemurians. But it's not clear if she is one. This would be easily solved if we had such tag system.
thread_title: Add Tags to Awakeners and Cards

content: This also implies a desired separation of concerns: currently we know whether or not someone is lemurian by the "faction" tab on the archives. But this mixes a gameplay element (lemurian tag), with an story element. Which is not entirely correct, since this yields questions like: why so and so do not belong to the faction?
thread_title: Add Tags to Awakeners and Cards
